hero.subtitle: Unapologetic heritage for the modern muse. From Jamdani sarees to Chanderi blouses — centuries-old craftsmanship colliding with contemporary elegance, crafted in Kolkata.

features.title: The Womaniya Way
features.handwoven_desc: Every thread is hand-spun and hand-woven by master weavers whose craft spans generations.
features.artisan_desc: We work directly with Jamdani weavers, Chanderi silk artisans, Ikkat Pochampally craftsmen, and Ajrakh block printers.
features.conscious_desc: Slow, mindful processes — handspun, handwoven, hand block printed — preserving the soul of true craftsmanship.
features.heritage_desc: Each piece carries the story of human hands, patience, and centuries of artistry kept alive.

shop.title: The Collection
shop.subtitle: Each piece is a conversation between tradition and the present moment.
shop.no_products: No pieces found in this category.

categories.jamdani_desc: The poetry of Bengal — woven thread by thread by masters in Dhaka and Murshidabad. A UNESCO-recognised intangible heritage.
categories.ikkat_desc: Resist-dyed threads rhythmically bound before weaving, creating geometric patterns that shimmer and move.
categories.ajrakh_desc: Ancient geometry pressed into living cloth using hand-carved wooden blocks and natural dyes.
categories.tant_desc: Airy, breathable, and luminous — the everyday luxury of Bengal woven fine on looms of Nadia and Murshidabad.
categories.blouse_desc: Chanderi silk, zardozi handwork, golden zari motifs — crafted to perfection in Kolkata. The perfect match for your saree.
categories.rtw_desc: Heritage silhouettes designed for modern life — comfortable, expressive, and effortlessly wearable.

product.care_desc: Dry clean or gentle hand wash in cold water. Store in muslin bag.

about.title: Where Tradition Meets Today
about.intro: At Womaniya, we celebrate the beauty of handloom traditions by transforming them into contemporary, wearable fashion. Rooted in craft and guided by conscious design, our work brings together heritage textiles and modern silhouettes that fit seamlessly into everyday life.
about.body_1: We collaborate closely with skilled Jamdani weavers, Chanderi silk artisans, Ikkat Pochampally craftsmen, and Ajrakh block printers — communities whose knowledge has been passed down through generations. Every textile is thoughtfully created through slow, mindful processes — handspun, handwoven, and hand block printed — preserving the authenticity and soul of true craftsmanship.
about.body_2: From designer blouses with zardozi handwork to heritage sarees and versatile wardrobe pieces — everything is crafted in Kolkata with care. Each garment reflects a dialogue between tradition and modernity, where heritage techniques are reimagined into contemporary forms.
about.body_3: By working directly with local artisans and weaving communities, we support sustainable livelihoods while keeping India's rich textile legacy alive. Every piece you wear carries the story of human hands, patience, and artistry.
about.closing: We don't just create fashion — we create meaningful, wearable heritage.

story.title: Woven With Intent
story.body: Womaniya was born in Kolkata from a deep love for India's handloom heritage and a belief that this living art deserves a place in the modern wardrobe. Since 2019, we've been sourcing directly from weaving communities across Bengal, Telangana, and Gujarat — ensuring artisans are fairly compensated and their craft is preserved.

glimpses.title: From Loom to Wardrobe
glimpses.subtitle: Every piece begins its journey on the hands of master artisans.
glimpses.item_1_desc: The rhythmic dance of hand and shuttle — threads interlaced with centuries of knowledge.
glimpses.item_2_desc: Indigo, madder, turmeric — colours drawn from earth, pressed into cloth.
glimpses.item_3_desc: Wooden blocks carved by hand, each strike a meditation in precision.
glimpses.item_4_desc: Every hem, every fold — finished with care by skilled hands.

process.title: How We Craft
process.subtitle: From raw fibre to wearable heritage — each step honours tradition.
process.step_1_desc: We travel to weaving clusters — Bengal, Pochampally, Kutch — to meet artisans and select materials.
process.step_2_desc: Handloom weaving, resist dyeing, block printing — techniques passed down through generations.
process.step_3_desc: We collaborate with artisans to adapt traditional motifs for contemporary silhouettes.
process.step_4_desc: Carefully packed and sent — each piece arrives with the story of its making.

manifesto.title: We believe in the slow rhythm of the loom.
manifesto.subtitle: In a world of fast fashion, Womaniya stands for the enduring power of human hands. We celebrate the imperfections, the patience, and the profound beauty of authentic Indian handloom.

voices.title: Voices of the Craft
voices.subtitle: Hear from the master artisans and the women who wear their art.
voices.quote_1: Each thread I weave carries a prayer. It is not just cloth; it is my family's legacy.
voices.quote_2: Wearing a Womaniya Jamdani feels like wearing a piece of history. The craftsmanship is palpable.
voices.quote_3: We don't rush the loom. The design decides its own time.

admin.title: Womaniya Admin
admin.photo_hint: Point your camera at the saree

footer.about_short: Contemporary fashion rooted in India's handloom heritage — Jamdani, Tant, Chanderi blouses, Ikkat, Ajrakh. Crafted in Kolkata.
footer.made_with: Made with reverence for Indian craft.
